title: Muscle Gain – Vegetarian
plateMethod: Eat balanced meals with adequate protein at each: aim for ~1.6–2 g protein per kg body weight from legumes, dairy, tofu, and paneer. Include complex carbs (oats, rice, potatoes) and healthy fats. Spread intake across 3–4 meals and optional snacks.
hydration: Drink 2.5–3 L of water daily. Hydration supports recovery and performance. Have water with meals and during training.
sampleMeals: Breakfast: Oatmeal with banana, nuts, and a scoop of protein or Greek yogurt; or tofu scramble with toast and avocado.
Lunch: Dal or chickpea curry with rice, vegetables, and a side of yogurt or paneer.
Dinner: Tofu or paneer stir-fry with vegetables and quinoa; or lentil soup with whole-grain bread and salad.
Post-workout: Greek yogurt with fruit and nuts; or a smoothie with banana, milk, and protein.
Snacks: Nuts, cheese, hummus with veggies, or a peanut butter sandwich.
disclaimer: General guidance only; consult a healthcare or nutrition professional for personalized advice, especially if you have medical conditions or dietary restrictions.
